data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a dry northeast monsoon, the weather will remain cool in the morning over the coast of Guangdong in the next couple of days. The band of clouds covering southern China will thin out gradually tomorrow. The weather will be fine with relatively large temperature difference between day and night over the region on Thursday. A strong replenishment of the monsoon is expected to affect the coast of southern China on Friday to early Saturday. With the monsoon moderating slightly, temperatures will rise gradually over southern China early next week. Besides, the tropical cyclone over the western North Pacific to the east of the Philippines will move slowly in the general direction of northeast in the next couple of days, and then weaken gradually.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260311","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"East to northeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
